Off Calendar Dec-16-2016 Continued To Jan-25-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion To Compel Responses To Requests For Production To Plaintiff, Set No. One
Off Calendar Oct-28-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANTS ANIL ADVANI and INVENTUS LAW, INC.'s Motion To Compel Responses To Requests For Production To Plaintiff, Set No. One is OFF CALENDAR at request of the moving party.

Judge Pro Tem: Greg Call; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-22-2016 Set For Trial On Feb-21-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-21-2016 Continued To Jul-06-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Order To Show Cause To Defendants (Opp Due 12/22/15, Reply Due 12/30/15, Hearing: 1/7/16)
Off Calendar Jan-28-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jonathan Gaskin of Kaufhold Gaskin LLP telephone number 415-944-9403 for Plaintiff Global Cricket Ventures.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Order To Show Cause is granted. No opposition filed. Defendants filed a response stating that they do not oppose Plaintiff's application for a preliminary injunction as that application is stated in the Court's December 8, 2015, Order to Show Cause. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/EG)

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Jan-12-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF GLOBAL CRICKET VENTURES LIMITED, MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE is granted. No opposition filed. The moving party is to provide a formal form of order.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/EG)

Order To Show Cause To Defendants (Opp Due 12/22/15, Reply Due 12/30/15, Hearing: 1/7/16)
Off Calendar Jan-07-2016 Continued To Jan-28-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Alex Catalona of Becherer Kannett & Schweitzer telephone number 510-658-3600 for Defendants Inventus Law, Inc. and Anil Advani.

Mr. Catalona advised the Court that they were just retained late yesterday and requested a continuance. The Court vacated its tentative ruling. The Order To Show Cause To Defendants is continued to January 28, 2016 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302. The temporary restraining order is to remain in place until the date of the hearing.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489. (302/EG)
